creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text: This patch did pass QA, but in the two months that it has sat it has become outdated and irrelevant. Mercurial is now on version 4.0, and although there are a few more upstream (hg-git) commits, none mark the extension compatible with a version greater than 3.9, so this patch is currently only relevant to those who have held back their Mercurial port.
